description: Style note Low-cut styling on the classic suede boot, this woodland shoe is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with lugs, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorialist dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlaysFive-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyeletsPadded tonguePull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsolerubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and an upraised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper on the toe box and heel collar as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
